name: Nippon Shikizai, Inc.
summary: Nippon Shikizai, Inc. researches and develops, manufactures, and sells cosmetics in Japan and internationally. The company offers lip products, such as lipsticks, and lip liners and glosses; eye products, including eye shadows, mascaras, eye liners, and eyebrow make-up products; and facial products comprising foundations, concealers, loose powders, blushes, and highlighters. It also provides skin care products, such as sunscreen and whitening products, scrubs, masks, and cleansers. Nippon Shikizai, Inc. was founded in 1930 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
